overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza transitioning to a busy street with elevated highways. The scene features characteristic cyan and purple neon lighting, corporate signage, and dense cyberpunk architecture at dusk.

exiting covered walkway into semi-open plaza with visible palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian plaza illuminated by cyan ceiling beams and purple vertical neon tubes. The camera moves forward past concrete planters with glowing edges, transitioning from deep shadow to areas with more ambient light as palm trees become visible in the distance.

ascending concrete stairs to upper plaza level

wide concrete staircase with metal handrails leading upward
silver metal safety railings along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a corner of the plaza featuring a prominent red vending machine, then ascends a concrete stairway. The neon ceiling beams disappear from view as the stairs lead upward, with the purple neon tubes receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open plaza with corporate signage and palm trees

events.description: emerging onto upper open plaza with softsys corporate signage visible
beginning descent down stairs toward street level

tall palm trees in planters scattered across the upper plaza
multi-level highway structure with vehicles visible on upper decks
tall building with large red neon signage reading 'HYDRO SUBSIDIUM'
wall with integrated vertical greenery and plants

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an open upper plaza at dusk, featuring corporate signage for 'softsys' and scattered palm trees. The elevated highway overpass becomes visible in the distance as the camera moves past a vertical garden wall, then approaches stairs leading downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-level street with overpasses and futuristic traffic

events.description: descending stairs and entering street level with moving traffic visible
futuristic vehicles including a cyan car and purple sedan driving past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to moderate traffic flow under elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: cyan futuristic car driving along the street with headlights on
purple sedan passing by on the road with glowing tail lights

entered.detail: stream of futuristic cars with neon accents driving on the multi-lane road
traffic signal showing red light with neon illumination
concrete wall with repeating red triangular warning symbols
tall building facades covered with large holographic advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level into a busy cyberpunk thoroughfare with multiple lanes of futuristic traffic passing by. Elevated highway overpasses crisscross above while the camera walks past a wall with red warning signs, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian plaza into the sprawling openness of a busy cyberpunk thoroughfare at dusk. It begins beneath a covered ceiling of cyan beams and purple neon tubes, gliding past glowing concrete planters and emerging from deep shadows toward distant palm trees. As the camera passes a red vending machine, it ascends a concrete stairway, causing the neon ceiling to vanish and the purple lights to recede. The scene then opens onto an upper plaza featuring corporate signage for softsys and a vertical garden wall, before the camera turns toward a set of stairs leading downward. Finally, the view descends to street level, shifting from the quiet plaza to a dense urban corridor filled with futuristic traffic, red warning signs, and towering buildings draped in neon billboards beneath crisscrossing highway overpasses.
